name: facebook-opportunity-radar
description: Local desktop radar and Chrome extension for spotting visible Facebook group sourcing opportunities.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @foradar/shared && npm run dev --workspace facebook-opportunity-radar-desktop
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @foradar/shared && npm run build --workspace facebook-opportunity-radar-desktop
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run package:win --workspace facebook-opportunity-radar-desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @foradar/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace facebook-opportunity-radar-desktop
